data.name: Lust of the Apartment Wives
data.detailed_description:
A small apartment complex...The type that might exist anywhere...

Our main character is a grocery deliveryman who's polite demeanor and pleasant smile have earned him a bit of celebrity status around the complex.
But his smile is not as innocent as it seems...

He has an ulterior motive...Sampling some of these finely aged apartment wives!

Kaori, positively overflowing with mature sexuality.
Ryoko, plain to look at but with a hidden lust bubbling under the surface.
And Mayumi, still nursing her newborn child and with a chest that makes our hero weak.

Their husbands can no longer satisfy them, so now it's up to you!

The following features are included:
- Full voice for female characters only
- CG / Event Scene / Music Listening Mode
- Automatic Play Mode

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7, Windows 8, Windows 10
  • 處理器: Pentium II 233MHz
  • 記憶體: 128 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Required Resolution: 800 x 600
  • DirectX: 版本：7.0a
  • 儲存空間: 800 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: PCM, Direct Sound
